name: Cheese and Corn Tortillas
recipeIngredient: 6 oz Shredded, reduced fat cheddar cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Pre-heat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease a 9 x 13 inch baking dish.
3. Mix the first six ingredients in a bowl, reserving half of the shredded cheese.
4. Spoon about one-half cup of the mixture down the center of each tortilla.
5. Roll up the tortillas tightly and arrange seam side down in the baking dish.
6. Top with salsa and the remaining shredded cheese.
7. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes.
Makes 6 servings; 280 calories, 8 g fat, 22 g protein, 30 mg cholesterol, 29 g carbohydrate, 560 mg sodium each.
